---
name: Example bug
about: An example in this repo doesn't build / run / work correctly
title: "[example] "
labels: ["bug", "example"]
---

**Which example**
e.g. `examples/visit-feature-expo`

**What happened**
A clear description. Include the failing command + its output.

**Environment**
- OS + version
- Node + pnpm versions
- For mobile examples: device / simulator + Expo SDK or RN version

**What you tried**
Any debugging steps you've already taken.
